content.body: Hi all, I'm co-chair of the Private Advertising Technology Working Group. We have a spec that we'd like the group's expertise and review on. I've opened an issue in what is hopefully the right space. Please let me know if I need to file it anywhere else or if there's any more information needed - https://github.com/tc39/agendas/issues/2126
AramZS: I'm not sure what TC39 reviewing this is supposed to look at?
content.formatted_body: AramZS: I'm not sure what TC39 reviewing this is supposed to look at?

content.body: Yes, it would be helpful to know what you are looking for specifically from TC39 folks.
